fields.ChannelList: scrolling container; one ChannelRow.ui appended per visible channel, addressed as #ChannelList[i]
fields.ChannelList[i] Name/Meta/Swatch: per-row display name, 'type | access' subtitle, and resolved channel color
fields.ChannelEmpty: shown when no channels are visible
fields.PasswordInput: password used by Speak Here / Listen for locked channels

actions.ManageTempButton: opens TempChannelManage.ui (visible only to the temp-channel owner)

relatedPages.TempChannel.ui: create form: TempNameInput, TempPasswordInput, TempPrefixInput, TempAliasesInput, CreateTempButton, CancelTempButton
relatedPages.TempChannelManage.ui: manager: ManageChannelName, ManageExpiry, ManagePasswordInput, ManagePrefixInput, SaveChannelButton, CloseChannelButton, BackToChannelsButton
